title: TrustAdmin
description: You think that you Friend that host the Minecraft Server is a Cheater? Just let you Friend install TrustAdmin.
body:
## Make it IMPOSSIBLE to Cheat without knowing it others! (Build Trust :D)
The Plugin is getting a new Name, that means sometimes it still have the Name
OPLeaker instead of TrustAdmin.

## Important
**For Better Detection please use [Protocollib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) or else the Plugin will use a not recommended detection.**


Features:

- CommandWatcher
- ConsoleWatcher
- GamemodeWatcher
- Config
- Log System
- /opl [reload/status/download/version]

### CommandWatcher
Every Single command that got executed with OP will be logged and displayed in the Chat for everyone!

### ConsoleWatcher
Never bypass any Command. The commands in the Console will be also logged and Displayed in the Chat.

### GamemodWatcher
See when you friends is switching his Gamemode to cheat!

### Log System
We have an Easy Log System that logs everthing with Date and Time. The Executer,Target and Full Command.

### /opl 
To make more transperancy your Players can see that opl(OPLeaker) is working fine with /opl status!
**There coming more commands like downloading Config or Logs.**
